meta.title: Vascular Surgery Practice Software | Wound RTM & Surgical Coordination | clinIQ
meta.description: Complete guide to vascular surgery practice operations. Wound and limb salvage RTM. Vascular lab coordination. Surgical authorization. Post-op surveillance.

hero.subhead: Your wound patients need monitoring between visits. Your vascular lab needs coordination. Your surgical authorizations need tracking. clinIQ captures vascular RTM, coordinates testing, and manages surgical workflows.

sections.content:
Vascular surgery practices manage chronic wound patients, coordinate extensive non-invasive testing, and perform complex surgical procedures.

**The wound monitoring opportunity:**

PAD patients with wounds need between-visit monitoring. Wound progression, pain, infection signs — this monitoring qualifies for RTM.

50 wound patients × $130/month = $6,500/month in RTM.

Vascular wound patients benefit from systematic monitoring.

**What patients track:**
- Wound appearance and drainage
- Pain levels (rest pain, claudication distance)
- Signs of infection
- Compliance with offloading

**What clinIQ does:**

Photo submission: Wound photos for remote assessment.

Pain tracking: Claudication distance, rest pain monitoring.

Alert thresholds: Wound worsening, increasing pain → alerts.

Arterial and venous testing is core to vascular surgery.

**Tests tracked:**
- ABI/TBI
- Arterial duplex
- Venous duplex
- CTA/MRA coordination

**What clinIQ does:**

Test pipeline: Ordered → scheduled → completed → read → available.

Pre-visit completion: Testing done before surgical consultation.

Vascular procedures require authorization.

**What clinIQ does:**

Auth tracking: Status per patient per procedure.

Medical necessity: Prior testing, conservative treatment documented.

Pre-op coordination: Cardiac clearance, labs, imaging.

Bypass grafts and stents require surveillance.

**What clinIQ does:**

Surveillance schedule: Duplex intervals based on procedure.

Due date tracking: Surveillance due, not scheduled → alert.

Graft/stent registry: All interventions tracked with surveillance status.

**Week 1-2:** Wound RTM, vascular lab coordination, surgical tracking configured.

**ROI:** RTM revenue $78,000/year. Better surgical coordination. Surveillance compliance.

**Investment:** Professional $499/month. Implementation $750 one-time.

faqs.a: Yes. Wound monitoring qualifies for RTM codes.

faqs.q: How do you track graft surveillance?
faqs.a: Surveillance schedule per procedure. Due dates tracked. Alerts for overdue surveillance.
